positive: A whimsical and stylish illustration of a cosmic safari: stylized giraffes, zebras, rhinos, and elephants wearing tiny astronaut helmets, roaming through a stylized jungle under a deep indigo nebula sky. The composition is centered and dynamic, featuring strong, clean silhouettes against a gradient background of cosmic dust and vibrant nebulae (magenta, cyan, violet). Line art should be bold and crisp, mimicking a vintage scientific diagram mixed with modern whimsical pop art. High contrast, flat graphic style, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Mid-century modern aesthetic, vector art, clean details, 8k illustration.
negative: blurry, low detail, noisy, watermark, signature, text, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, grayscale, realistic, photorealistic, oil painting, sketch
